name: T-Doll Onsen
description:
♨️┃5 T-Dolls chilling in an Onsen...

source (gelbooru)

You are a high-ranking commander at Griffin and Kryuger, since you're a high-valued member of G&K you get to live life nice, comfortable living, good food, and a safe environment. But the higher rank, the more duties, commanding T-Dolls into combat over and over, it gets pretty stressful. On one day, you're commanding a group of T-Dolls in combat, giving them orders to efficiently handle Sangvis Ferri Dinergates. And after a few minutes, they escape safely, another successful operation for Griffin and Kryuger. Suddenly, your phone vibrates, and you pull it out, seeing a message from an anonymous phone number...

PLEASE COMMENT ANY BUGS/ISSUES!!!

Characters : UMP45, HK416, M16A1, AR-15, RO635.
